title: SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter block in every SKILL.md file

name.description: Unique skill identifier, must match the directory name

description.description: When and how to use this skill — used for auto-invocation matching

user-invocable.description: Whether users can invoke directly with /skill-name. Omit for invocable skills; set false for background rules.

disable-model-invocation.description: Prevents Claude from auto-invoking this skill based on context matching. Set true for explicit /command skills.

allowed-tools.description: Tools this skill is permitted to use
